Resources.Name: Address
Resources.Description: An address represents a physical and/or mailing address for a person.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-city) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: App
Resources.Description: An app is one of the handful of apps that Planning Center offers that organizations can subscribe to, e.g. Services, Registrations, etc.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: BirthdayPeople
Resources.Description:
Returns upcoming birthdays for the organization.

Note: This endpoint will always only return the first 15 people having a birthday in the next 30 days, ordered by birthday, ascending.

Resources.Name: Campus
Resources.Description: A Campus is a location belonging to an Organization

Attributes.Name: time_zone_raw
Attributes.Description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-international) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Condition
Resources.Description: A condition is an individual criterion used by a List Rule.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-application) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ConnectedPerson
Resources.Description: A Connected Person is an account from a different organization linked to an account in this organization.

Resources.Name: CustomSender
Resources.Description: A custom sender that can be used when sending emails.

Resources.Name: Email
Resources.Description: An email represents an email address and location.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-address) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: FieldDatum
Resources.Description: A field datum is an individual piece of data for a custom field.

Relationships.Name: customizable
Relationships.Note: Currently, the only customizable relationship is with `Person`.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-file) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: FieldDefinition
Resources.Description: A field definition represents a custom field -- its name, data type, etc.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-config) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: FieldOption
Resources.Description: A field option represents an individual option for a custom field of type "select" or "checkboxes".

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-sequence) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Form
Resources.Description: A custom form for people to fill out.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-active) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: FormCategory
Resources.Description: A Form Category

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: FormField
Resources.Description: A field in a custom form.

Relationships.Name: fieldable
Relationships.Note: Polymorphic. Fieldable can be any of the following: FieldDefinition, NoteCategory, or Workflow.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: FormFieldOption
Resources.Description: A field option on a custom form field.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: FormSubmission
Resources.Description: A form submission.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: FormSubmissionValue
Resources.Description: A form submission value.

Resources.Name: Household
Resources.Description: A household links people together and can have a primary contact. To add a person to an existing household, use the HouseholdMemberships endpoint.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: HouseholdMembership
Resources.Description: A household membership is the linking record between a household and a person.

Attributes.Name: household_role
Attributes.Description: The role of the person within the household. Possible values are: `adult`, `child_or_dependent`, `other_adult`or`parent_guardian`.

Attributes.Name: pending
Attributes.Description: False when a person's membership in a household is unverified.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-pending) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: InactiveReason
Resources.Description: An inactive reason is a small bit of text indicating why a member is no longer active.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-value) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: List
Resources.Description: A list is a powerful tool for finding and grouping people together using any criteria imaginable.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-batch_completed_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ListCategory
Resources.Description: A List Category

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ListResult
Resources.Description: A list result

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ListShare
Resources.Description: A list share indicates who has access to edit a list.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

CanQueryBy.Name: group
CanQueryBy.Description:
Query on a specific group

Possible values: `No Access`, `Viewer`, `Editor`, or `Manager`

CanQueryBy.Name: permission
CanQueryBy.Description:
Query on a specific permission

Possible values: `view` or `manage`

Resources.Name: ListStar
Resources.Description: A starred list for a person indicates it is special in some way

Resources.Name: MailchimpSyncStatus
Resources.Description: The status of syncing a List with Mailchimp.

Resources.Name: MaritalStatus
Resources.Description: A martial status represents a member's current status, e.g. married, single, etc.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-sequence) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Message
Resources.Description: A message is an individual email or sms text sent to a member. Every message has a parent message group.

CanQueryBy.Name: kind
CanQueryBy.Description:
Query on a specific kind

Possible values: `email`, `sms`, or `church_center_message`

Resources.Name: MessageGroup
Resources.Description: A message group represents one or more emails or text messages sent from one of the Planning Center apps. The message group indicates the from person, app, etc.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-contains_user_generated_content) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: NamePrefix
Resources.Description: A name prefix is one of Mr., Mrs., etc.

Resources.Name: NameSuffix
Resources.Description: A name suffix is one of Sr., Jr., etc.

Resources.Name: Note
Resources.Description: A note is text with a category connected to a person’s profile.

Resources.Description: A Note Category

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: NoteCategoryShare
Resources.Description: A note category share defines who can view notes in a category.

CanQueryBy.Name: permission
CanQueryBy.Description:
Query on a specific permission

Possible values: `view`, `view_create`, or `manage`

Resources.Name: NoteCategorySubscription
Resources.Description: A subscription for note categories

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Organization
Resources.Description: The organization represents a single church. Every other resource is scoped to this record.

Filters.Name: include_deleted
Filters.Description: By default, deleted fields are not included. Pass filter=include_deleted to include them.

Filters.Name: created_since
Filters.Description: filter people created in the last 24 hours; pass an additional `time` parameter in ISO 8601 format to specify your own timeframe

Resources.Name: OrganizationStatistics
Resources.Description: Returns statistics for the organization.

Resources.Name: PeopleImport
Resources.Description: A PeopleImport is a record of an ongoing or previous import from a CSV file.

CanQueryBy.Name: status
CanQueryBy.Description:
Query on a specific status

Possible values: `matching`, `processing_preview`, `previewing`, `processing_import`, `complete`, `undone`, or `undoing`

Resources.Name: PeopleImportConflict
Resources.Description: A PeopleImportConflict is a record of change that will occur if the parent PeopleImport is completed.

Resources.Name: PeopleImportHistory
Resources.Description: A PeopleImportHistory is a record of change that occurred when the parent PeopleImport was completed.

Resources.Name: Person
Resources.Description: A person record represents a single member/user of the application. Each person has different permissions that determine how the user can use this app (if at all).

Attributes.Name: directory_shared_info
Attributes.Description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: mfa_configured
Attributes.Description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: stripe_customer_identifier
Attributes.Description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Children.Name: messages
Children.Description:
The Person's received messages. Can also receive a filter
to return `sent` or `unread`
e.g. `?filter=sent`

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-accounting_administrator) to reverse the order

CanQueryBy.Name: inactivated_at
CanQueryBy.Description: Set to an ISO 8601 date or time to make the profile inactive. Set to "null" to reactivate the profile.

CanQueryBy.Name: mfa_configured
CanQueryBy.Description: Set to "true" or "false" to filter. Can only be viewed and queried by an Organization Administrator.

CanQueryBy.Name: status
CanQueryBy.Description: Set to "inactive" to set "inactivated_at" to the current time and make the profile inactive. Set to anything else to clear "inactivated_at" and reactivate the profile.

Resources.Name: PersonApp
Resources.Description: A Person App is the relationship between a Person and an App.

Resources.Name: PersonMerger
Resources.Description: A Person Merger is the history of profiles that were merged into other profiles.

Resources.Name: PhoneNumber
Resources.Description: A phone number represents a single telephone number and location.

Resources.Name: PlatformNotification
Resources.Description: A Platform Notification is a suite-wide notification that shows at the top of each application's screen until dismissed by the user.

Resources.Description: A report is editable liquid syntax that provides a powerful tool for presenting your Lists however you want.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-body) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Rule
Resources.Description: A rule belongs to a List and groups conditions together.

Resources.Name: SchoolOption

Valid values are `day`, `week`, or `month`
